name: Broiled Chicken with Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the chicken with 2 pressed garlic cloves and rosemary. Also rub with salt and pepper.
2. Let stand for 30 minutes.
3. Place chicken in a broiler pan and coat the top with bouillon.
4. Sprinkle with 2 slivered garlic cloves. Add a little bouillon to the pan.
5. Broil, turning when half done.
6. Coat the top sides with bouillon and 2 more slivered garlics.
7. Baste with pan drippings.
